# PERF-028 positive: sync.Mutex allocated inside a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-028-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type perRequest struct {
	mu sync.Mutex
	n  int
}

func Increment(c *gin.Context) {
	counter := &perRequest{}
	counter.mu.Lock()
	counter.n++
	counter.mu.Unlock()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"n": counter.n})
}
